response.justification: Bogdan Szabo demonstrates extensive experience in high-scale systems, distributed architectures, and experimentation-enabling tooling, particularly at Meta and Google. His hands-on background in telemetry, low-latency systems, and developer tooling aligns well with the role's focus on growth/experimentation platforms. While his experimentation-specific experience is less explicitly detailed, his system-level contributions and leadership at major tech companies suggest strong potential for this Principal-level role.
strengths: Proven ability to architect and scale distributed systems handling millions of requests/second (e.g., Meta's Direct Mail automation, Dunnhumby's micro-services infrastructure)
Deep technical leadership at top-tier companies (Google, Meta) with cross-functional collaboration and mentorship experience
Strong hands-on coding background across multiple languages (C, C++, Java, JavaScript, TypeScript, Python) and domains (web, mobile, embedded, AI tools)
concerns: Limited explicit mention of experimentation/feature-flagging platforms or statistical rigor in growth contexts in resume materials
No clear evidence of building unified experimentation frameworks or measurement platforms used across multiple teams
Relatively sparse documentation of AI tool usage to accelerate engineering velocity, despite recent work in AI-agent infrastructure
